caption: The video appears to be a promotional or introductory segment for a literary event titled "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring Greg Delanty reading from his latest book, "No More Time." The cover of the book is prominently displayed on the left side of the screen, showing an illustration of a lemur-like creature perched on a tree branch. The text on the right side of the screen introduces the event and provides details about the recording date, December 14, 2020, and the platform used, Zoom. A small inset image of Greg Delanty is also visible, suggesting that he will be the main speaker or reader during this session. The overall design is clean and professional, with a blue background and white text, creating a focused and engaging visual for viewers.
